config.name: I2C_USE_SYNCHRONIZATION
config.brief: Support for synchronous I2C master APIs.

config.name: I2C_USE_CONFIGURATIONS
config.note: When enabled the user must provide a variable named @p i2c_configurations of type @p i2c_configurations_t.

macro.name: i2cMasterTransmit
macro.param: Pointer to the I2C driver instance.
macro.implementation: i2cMasterTransmitTimeout(i2cp, addr, txbuf, txbytes, rxbuf, rxbytes, TIME_INFINITE)

macro.name: i2cMasterReceive
macro.param: Pointer to the I2C driver instance.

typedef.name: hal_i2c_driver_c
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an I2C driver.

typedef.name: hal_i2c_config_t
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an I2C configuration.

typedef.name: I2CDriver
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an I2C driver (legacy).

typedef.name: I2CConfig
typedef.brief: Type of structure representing an I2C configuration (legacy).

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ i2c_lld_config_fields;

field.name: cfgsnum
field.brief: Number of configurations in the open array.

fields.verbatim: /* End of the mandatory fields.*/ i2c_lld_driver_fields;

method.name: i2cStartMasterTransmitI
method.brief: Starts an I2C master transmit transaction.
method.details: When @p rxbytes is greater than zero, a receive phase follows the transmit phase using a repeated start.

method.name: i2cStartMasterReceiveI
method.brief: Starts an I2C master receive transaction.

method.name: i2cStopTransferI
method.brief: Stops an ongoing I2C master transaction.

method.name: i2cStopTransfer
method.brief: Stops an ongoing I2C master transaction.

method.name: i2cSynchronizeS
method.note: This function can only be called by a single thread at time.

method.name: i2cSynchronize
method.note: This function can only be called by a single thread at time.

method.name: i2cMasterTransmitTimeout
method.brief: Performs an I2C master transmit transaction.

method.name: i2cMasterReceiveTimeout
method.brief: Performs an I2C master receive transaction.

method.name: i2cGetAndClearErrorsX
method.brief: Gets and clears cached I2C errors.

method.name: __i2c_wakeup_isr
method.note: This function is meant to be used in low level drivers.
